spec_match.rationale: Excellently demonstrates the timeline difference when target_hint matches the actual click.

interactive.rationale: Warms three separate states interactively and lets users select same-tab vs new-tab actions to see hit vs discard diagnostics.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Directly represents the primary waste-prerender scenario the feature addresses.

edge_cases.rationale: Presents simulated timing differences with clear millisecond increments.

design_system.rationale: Beautiful column comparison cards adhering to design guidelines.

summary: A high-quality side-by-side simulator contrasting in-tab vs new-tab prerender timings and demonstrating trash actions.
